completed_tasks.name: RED package validation tests for exports, types, tarball contents, docs, and release workflow
JSDoc declaration generation, root export, and typed export map
Package validation tooling, tarball smoke, and CI package gate
Trusted-publishing release workflow, release docs, dry-run, and real publish auth gate

remaining_tasks.name: Publish @fullselfbrowsing/phantom-stream@0.1.0 to the public npm registry

blockers.description: Real npm publish was not run. The package is dry-run clean, but @fullselfbrowsing/phantom-stream@0.1.0 is not visible from npm in this environment; npm view returned E404.
blockers.workaround: Configure npm trusted publishing for owner fullselfbrowsing, repository PhantomStream, workflow .github/workflows/publish.yml, environment npm-publish, then publish through the GitHub release/manual workflow; or authenticate npm locally with publish rights and explicitly approve npm publish --access public.

human_actions_pending.action: Configure npm trusted publishing or provide authenticated npm publish approval.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 10 intentionally prepared and dry-ran the package but did not mutate the public npm registry without explicit user/auth approval.

human_actions_pending.action: Verify @fullselfbrowsing/phantom-stream@0.1.0 is installable from npm before starting Phase 11.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 11 depends on the published 0.x package for the FSB swap-in.

decisions.decision: Package remains source-first ESM; TypeScript generates .d.ts files from JSDoc only.
decisions.rationale: Provides typed package exports without converting the source tree to TypeScript.

decisions.decision: Trusted publishing uses GitHub Actions OIDC with id-token: write and no long-lived NPM_TOKEN.
decisions.rationale: Matches the release docs and avoids committing or configuring a persistent npm secret.

decisions.decision: Real npm publish remains a human/auth gate.
decisions.rationale: Publishing mutates the public registry and requires explicit user approval or trusted-publisher setup.

decisions.decision: Do not start Phase 11 until @fullselfbrowsing/phantom-stream@0.1.0 is installable from npm.
decisions.rationale: The FSB swap-in phase is explicitly ordered after the 0.x package publication.

next_action: Run $gsd-resume-work. First verify whether @fullselfbrowsing/phantom-stream@0.1.0 is now visible with npm view @fullselfbrowsing/phantom-stream version --json. If still E404, stop at the publish gate and either configure trusted publishing or request explicit authenticated publish approval. Do not begin Phase 11 until the package is installable from npm.
context_notes: Phase 10 implementation is complete and committed through plan 10-05. The repository has .github/workflows/publish.yml, docs/RELEASE.md, public publishConfig, full package:check validation, typed exports, quickstarts, and a clean npm publish dry-run. Last full validation passed npm run package:check with 405/405 tests plus types, publint, ATTW, dry-run pack, tarball smoke, and npm publish --dry-run --access public. Real npm publish --access public was intentionally not run.
